message:
refactor: extract coalesceRanges, clean up page-processor and partial-agg

- Extract coalesceRanges into src/coalesce.ts shared module
- Fragment DO now uses coalesced R2 reads instead of per-page fetches
- Page processor uses typed exports instead of (wasm.exports as any)
- Partial agg uses null byte separator for group keys to avoid
  collisions with pipe characters in data
- Hoist fs import outside fragment loop in LocalExecutor
